Record Class DongeonGame

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
fr.uge.DongeonGame
Record Components:
dungeonLevel - The current difficulty/depth level of the dungeon.
currentFloor - The floor model containing the grid of rooms.
rooms - A direct map reference to the rooms on the floor.
public record DongeonGame(int dungeonLevel, Floor currentFloor, Map<Coordinate, Room> rooms) extends Record
Represents the state and logic of a single dungeon floor game session.

This record holds the current floor layout and the hero's game state. It manages hero spawning and movement pathfinding.

  • Constructor Details

    • DongeonGame

      public DongeonGame(int dungeonLevel, Floor floor)
      Constructs a game session for a specific floor. If the floor is empty, it triggers the finalization of floor generation.
      Parameters:
      dungeonLevel - The current level.
      floor - The floor layout.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if floor is null.

    • DongeonGame

      public DongeonGame(int dungeonLevel, Floor currentFloor, Map<Coordinate, Room> rooms)
      Creates an instance of a DongeonGame record class.
      Parameters:
      dungeonLevel - the value for the dungeonLevel record component
      currentFloor - the value for the currentFloor record component
      rooms - the value for the rooms record component

  • Method Details

    • getRoom

      public Optional<Room> getRoom(Coordinate coordinate)
      Safely retrieves a room at a specific coordinate.
      Parameters:
      coordinate - The position to check.
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the Room if it exists, or empty otherwise.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if coordinate is null.

    • initializeHeroPosition

      public Hero initializeHeroPosition(Hero baseHero)
      Places the hero at a random valid starting position.

      The hero is always spawned in a TypeRoom.CORRIDOR to avoid immediate combat or interaction upon entering a floor.

      Parameters:
      baseHero - The hero object containing current stats and inventory.
      Returns:
      A new Hero instance positioned at the spawn point.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if baseHero is null.
      IllegalStateException - if no corridors are found on the floor.

    • moveTo

      public Hero moveTo(Hero hero, Coordinate target)
      Calculates a path and moves the hero towards a target coordinate.

      The movement stops automatically if the hero enters an interactive room (like a Battle, Treasure, or Boss room), allowing the game loop to trigger the event.

      Parameters:
      hero - The hero moving.
      target - The destination coordinate.
      Returns:
      The updated Hero object after the movement (or partial movement).
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if hero or target is null.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

      Returns the value of the dungeonLevel record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the dungeonLevel record component

      Returns:
